item.title: MTV's Hilarious Dating Show You Forgot About
item.description: A playful look back at MTV's dating show that somehow slipped through the memory cracks.

item.title: TikTok’s Newest Obsession Is A Little Awkward
item.description: A playful look at TikTok’s latest obsession, with all the awkward energy you’d expect.

item.title: This Movie Is So Bad, It’s Almost Charming
item.description: A playful take on a movie that’s so bad it becomes oddly entertaining.

media:content.media:title: This Movie Is So Bad, It’s Almost Charming
media:content.media:description: A playful take on a movie that’s so bad it becomes oddly entertaining.
